youtube_chapters:
0:00 Intro
0:12 Configure the slide
0:24 Preview and present live
youtube_chapters_notes: 3 chapters, all >=10s apart, validated against r6 (42s = 39s tutorial + 3s outro). Apply by pasting into YouTube video description at publish time. Also stored in using-the-open-ended-slide.chapters.txt.
notes: r6: Removed oe-settings step (settings section at ~0:26 in r5). Re-stitched r5 video by cutting 24.2s-35.0s (settings tooltip + preview loading), joining directly to oe-preview-open. VO re-timed: s06=24.2s (was s07 at 35s), s07=29.2s (was s08 at 40s), s08=35.2s (was s09 at 46s). check_vo_overlap.py PASS. Single voice Liam. Video 39.0s (cut from 50.64s by removing 10.8s settings section). Branded outro 3s appended. Tail 1.48s. No settings VO in narration.

steps.display_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words.
steps.tts_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words.

steps.display_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your question. Make it specific to spark a real response.
steps.tts_text: Type your question. Make it specific to spark a real response.

steps.display_text: Grid shows all responses at once. One by one reveals them individually.
steps.tts_text: Grid shows all responses at once. One by one reveals them individually.

steps.display_text: Hit Preview to rehearse the slide and see the participant view before going live.
steps.tts_text: Hit Preview to rehearse the slide and see the participant view before going live.

steps.display_text: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly.
steps.tts_text: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly.

steps.display_text: Answers appear live. Hit Present to go.
steps.tts_text: Answers appear live. Hit Present to go.

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i open-ended-r6-final.webm -i vo/s01.mp3 -i vo/s02.mp3 -i vo/s03.mp3 -i vo/s04.mp3 -i vo/s05.mp3 -i vo/s06.mp3 -i vo/s07.mp3 -i vo/s08.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6000|6000[a2];[3:a]adelay=10000|10000[a3];[4:a]adelay=15000|15000[a4];[5:a]adelay=20000|20000[a5];[6:a]adelay=24200|24200[a6];[7:a]adelay=29200|29200[a7];[8:a]adelay=35200|35200[a8];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8]amix=inputs=8:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k open-ended-r6-narrated.webm
